items.claim: Jean Paul has a 0% takedown defense in the UFC.
items.quote: He has a 0% takedown defense in the UFC, uh, to be fair.

items.claim: Co possesses a strength advantage over his opponents.
items.quote: His fight with, um, the Welsh gangster showed that like against Obin, I feel like he was showing a strength differential.
And at a 50% takedown defense, it's not it's kind of scary going against Austin Bashi

items.claim: Austin Bashi struggles on the feet when he cannot fully control his opponent.
items.quote: Austin Bash against Crod, he's shown that when he isn't able to fully control someone, he struggles on the feet.

items.claim: Austin Bashi overextends on his overhand strikes.
items.quote: He kind of overextends on some overhands.

items.claim: Tabitha Richie is unable to successfully execute takedowns.
items.quote: I feel like Richie in her last fight showed she's really bad and she can't really get takedowns going for her

items.claim: Tabitha Richie's striking ability is poor.
items.quote: her striking is a little bit abysmal.
